title: Pelgrin (species)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Pelgrin}}
The '''Pelgrin''' were an extinct species native to [[Pelgrin]]. Though primitive, they had the uncanny ability to duplicate advanced technology. They were the creators of the mysterious [[The Oracle (Pelgrin)|Oracle at Pelgrin]], over [[2,000,000 BBY|two million]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-08-XX -->''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''
